meaning: n.矿,矿山,矿井,源泉,宝库,地雷,水雷vt.挖掘,开采,在...布雷,破坏vi.开矿,埋设地雷 pron.我的
examples: He's a distant cousin of mine.
Half of the money was mine.
Mr. HOFFMAN: (As Jon Savage) A friend of mine does some consulting for the Guggenheim Foundation.
Memories, including mine, are created here, under bursts of stars and over Champagne brut.
